persona.name: Jackson Davis
persona.emotional_disposition: Enthusiastic about ideas, uncomfortable with emotions
persona.motivations_goals: Make scientific discoveries and find friends who share his interests
persona.communication_style: Technical, detailed, sometimes misses social cues
persona.knowledge_scope: Science, particularly physics and astronomy, scientific history
persona.backstory: Has converted his bedroom into a mini-laboratory, often misunderstood by peers

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Zainab, do you want to study together after school?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Madison Lee

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Madison, do you have a moment to discuss the debate tournament?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Benjamin Moore

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Benjamin, James, have you guys seen the new images from the James Webb Space Telescope? They're incredible!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Jackson Davis

actions.dialog_text: Hey Benjamin, James, have you guys seen the new images from the James Webb Space Telescope? They're incredible!
actions.plan: I wonder if Benjamin and James would be interested in discussing the latest findings on black holes. Maybe I can strike up a conversation about the recent NASA discoveries.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Madison, have you seen the new images from the James Webb Space Telescope? They’re really fascinating!
actions.plan: Benjamin seems busy talking to Madison about the debate tournament. Maybe I should wait for a better moment to discuss the telescope images. I could try talking to Madison instead, she might be interested in science too.

memories.description: Approached Benjamin and James to discuss the latest NASA discoveries from the James Webb Space Telescope.
Decided to approach Madison to discuss the James Webb Space Telescope images after noticing Benjamin was busy with the debate tournament.
